content_of_post_to_comment: I’m texting a guy I went on a first date with a week or so ago. We have both been travelling and so the timing has been off but he is so warm and unphased by us both having lives. He’s way nicer than me. He responds in a good amount of time and his responses are always warm and never half hearted. A wonderful case study in how to make a woman want to see you again, I have to say.
comment: There’s a weird asymmetry where his consistency reads as ease, but also removes any 'reading signals'—desire gets built from interpretation gaps, not just warmth.
